description: A black-and-white graphic combining two photographs of young boys, one in a patterned headwrap. Large white serif text overlaid reads '"I...held my son while he bled to death."' with a smaller italic line below describing a 12-year-old boy's mother recounting the moments after he and his 9-year-old best friend were hit by an illegal immigrant drunk driver.
notable_text: I...held my son while he bled to death.
